title: Support function calls with random arguments in constraints

features.name: constraint with function call on random variable argument
features.description: Code should include a constraint block containing a relational expression where one operand is a function call that receives a random variable as its argument

features.name: bitwise operation function on bit-vector argument
features.description: Code should include a function that takes a bit-vector argument and returns a bit-vector result produced by a bitwise AND operation on that argument
